productDisplayName: Nike Women Dunk Low Light Brown Shoe
description: The nike Dunk Low shoes give superior performance and comfort. The heel counter offers absolute ergonomic support and cushioning to the heel, while the outsole gives excellent traction. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic leather uppers with synthetic overlays for style, comfort and protection Perforations on the toe box for greater breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Tongue  covered in fabric with glistening thread details for added style Textile mesh lining for added comfort Appliqued swoosh on the sides and appliqued brand tab on the tongue Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Full length EVA midsole for added cushioning Outsole Flexible multi-directional rubber outsole with a full cupsole stitch for durability Pivot point on the big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
